channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Democrats look to quash threat from Green Party's Jill Stein
item.description: Democrats are sounding the alarm over Green Party candidate Jill Stein as they look to avoid a repeat of the 2016 presidential election, in which Stein was accused of playing spoiler in key swing states. For months, Democrats had trained their ire on Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, NewsNation

item.title: Trump kicks off a Pennsylvania rally by talking about Arnold Palmer's genitalia
item.description: His campaign suggested Donald Trump would begin previewing his campaign’s closing arguments in a final push to win over voters with Election Day barely two weeks off.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Will Weissert, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The US is investigating an unauthorized release of classified documents on Israel's attack plans
item.description: The United States is investigating an unauthorized release of classified documents that assess Israel’s plans to attack Iran and note that Israel continues to move military assets in place to conduct a military strike in response to Iran’s blistering ballistic missile attack on Oct. 1.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Mike Balsalmo, Eric Tucker And Tara Copp, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Democratic Party eyes Swifties with new youth voter campaign
item.description: The DNC is hoping to tap into the star's pool of young people and get them excited about the election.
item.dc:creator: Nick Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Harris courts voters in Atlanta with musical guest Usher
item.description: Singer Usher will also be in attendance. The vice president also campaigned earlier Saturday in Detroit alongside "Good as Hell" singer Lizzo.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: As Robert Roberson’s execution neared, Gov. Greg Abbott stuck to silence
item.description: It’s rare for governors to step in to halt executions. In the case of Robert Roberson, it ended up being state lawmakers who took extraordinary steps.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Terri Langford, KPRC 2

item.title: North Carolina sees record turnout for early voting after hurricane
item.description: "The conditions improve each and every day," the executive director of North Carolina's State Board of Elections said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kooiman, NewsNation

item.title: Harris eyes a rural Maine congressional district in a hunt for every possible electoral vote
item.description: LEWISTON, Maine (AP) — Rob Rogers has seen his rural corner of New England turn into a stronghold for Donald Trump in two consecutive elections. But this year he's feeling hopeful that Vice President Kamala Harris could reclaim a potentially decisive electoral vote for Democrats.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump couldn't pronounce 'Assyrians.' The community is happy to be in the spotlight
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — It was Donald Trump's mispronunciation that first caught attention. “Also, we have many Asur-Asians in our room,” Trump said at a weekend rally in Prescott Valley, Arizona. “We have some incredible people in our room.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Facing a budget deficit challenge, Johnson aims to safeguard youth and workforce
item.description: Enticing grocery store chains to open in underserved communities is another priority for the Johnson administration.
item.dc:creator: Julian Crews, WGN 9

item.title: Judge unseals heavily redacted trove of evidence in Trump's 2020 election interference case
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The judge overseeing Donald Trump's 2020 election interference case made public Friday a heavily redacted trove of documents that provide a small glimpse into the evidence prosecutors will present if the case ever goes to trial.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Disaster unemployment assistance available after Hurricane Milton
item.description: The Florida Commerce announced that Disaster Unemployment Assistance (DUA), is now available to businesses and residents whose employment or self-employment was lost or interrupted by Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: FLASHBACK: Harris declined to intervene on behalf of native tribe push to protect sacred site from wind farm
item.description: CA AG Kamala Harris' office said it did not have legal standing to take up the case of a Native American group fighting to preserve sacred burial ground from a wind farm.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GOP lawmaker in hurricane-ravaged Georgia demands emergency session of Congress
item.description: Rep. Buddy Carter is urging Congressional leaders to reconvene lawmakers in Washington, D.C., to deal with funding for disaster victims after the hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump expresses frustration about calls to deploy Haley
item.description: “But let me just tell you: Nikki Haley and I fought, and I beat her by 50, 60, 90 points. I beat her in her own state. I beat Nikki badly.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: AI-generated images have become a new form of propaganda this election season
item.description: This election cycle, AI-generated images have proliferated on social media platforms after politically charged news events. They often spread partisan narratives rather than facts.
item.dc:creator: Huo Jingnan, MPR News

item.title: 3 states renew efforts to limit abortion pill access
item.description: The lawsuit was filed in a Texas federal court Friday, roughly four months after the Supreme Court decided against undoing changes to the FDA’s regulations on the abortion pill that expanded access — such as allowing it to be mailed without an in-person doctor’s visit.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, Fox 5

item.title: Illinois alderwoman claims she was arrested after criticizing the mayor
item.description: Alderwoman Colby Chapman said she spent five hours in jail, in what she calls a politically motivated abuse of power.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk has given $75 million, so far, to put Donald Trump back in the White House
item.description: Elon Musk is among the largest financial supporters of Donald Trump's reelection efforts, new FEC filings show. He and two other megadonors collectively gave $300 million to support Trump.
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel, MPR News

item.title: Donald Trump addresses Economic Club of Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO — Former President Donald Trump is back in Chicago Tuesday. Trump addressed the Economic Club of Chicago at Fairmont Chicago, located at 200 North Columbus Drive, ahead of the Nov. 5 election.
item.dc:creator: Christine Flores, WGN 9

item.title: Election 2024: Races to watch in New Jersey
item.description: NEW JERSEY (PX11) -- It's been one of the most notable years for New Jersey politics in recent memory — indictments, upsets, and loss are just some themes of what has been a year that could shape the Garden State's political future for years to come.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11
